options.label: Lesson of Calamity
options.description: You gain the Stumbling Curse hex, and your familiar learns Ill Omen.

options.label: Lesson of Dreams
options.description: Dreams can be a window to greater insights. You gain the Veil of Dreams hex, and your familiar learns Sleep.

options.label: Lesson of Life
options.description: Life can be shared. You gain the Life Boost hex, and your familiar learns Spirit Link.

options.label: Lesson of Protection
options.description: An ounce of protection is worth a pound of cure. You gain the Blood Ward hex, and your familiar learns Mystic Armor.

options.label: Lesson of the Elements
options.description: Natural disasters and inclement weather hold more power than the mightiest creature. You gain the Elemental Betrayal hex. Your familiar learns your choice of breathe fire , gust of wind , hydraulic push , or pummeling rubble .

options.label: Lesson of Vengeance
options.description: Suffer not even the smallest slights. You gain the Needle of Vengeance hex, and your familiar learns Phantom Pain.

options.label: Lesson of Decay
options.description: All living things eventually decay, feeding fungus and insect. You gain the Mycological Malady hex, and your familiar learns Insect Form.

options.label: Lesson of Favors
options.description: You gain the Return the Favor hex, and your familiar learns Mind of Menace.

options.label: Lesson of Memory
options.description: Cobyslarni has untold years of memories, which he’s learned how to shape, recalling information—or obliterating it. You gain the Unravel Knowledge hex, and your familiar learns Hypercognition.

options.label: Lesson of Mischief
options.description: Nothing's wrong with some mischief, now and then. You gain the Deceiver's Cloak hex, and your familiar learns Mad Monkeys.

options.label: Lesson of Shadow
options.description: A shadow is far from empty—it contains something of the person who casts it. You gain the Malicious Shadow hex, and your familiar learns Chilling Darkness.

options.label: Lesson of Snow
options.description: Emulate snow, for it can snuff out life despite its gentleness. You gain the Personal Blizzard hex, and your familiar learns Wall of Wind.

options.label: Lesson of the Flock
options.description: Power flows when many work as one. You gain the Sheltering Wings hex, and your familiar learns Levitate.

options.label: Lesson of the Shark
options.description: Learn the ways of this deadly oceanic predator. You gain the Blood in the Water hex, and your familiar learns Feet to Fins.

options.label: Lesson of Vows
options.description: Words have power, and those who use them to deceive should be prepared to face the consequences. You gain the Censure Falsehoods hex, and your familiar learns Ring of Truth.

options.label: Lesson of Bargains
options.description: You gain the Over the Coals hex, and your familiar learns Subconscious Suggestion.

options.label: Lesson of Death
options.description: Death is final, yet not as inescapable as it may seem. You gain the Curse of Death hex, and your familiar learns Raise Dead.

options.label: Lesson of Renewal
options.description: Entropy comes for all, but it can be wound back through effort. You gain the Restorative Moment hex, and your familiar learns Field of Life.

options.label: Lesson of the Frozen Queen
options.description: You gain the Glacial Heart hex, and your familiar learns Wall of Ice.
